pi_items.source: Verified by reading export_result.sh which explicitly checks for SCREENSHOT_PATH='$EXPORT_DIR/mip_slab_view.png'.
Verified by reading export_result.sh which explicitly checks for TXT_PATH='$EXPORT_DIR/mpr_settings.txt'.
Verified by reading verifier.py which queries the VLM specifically for 'thickness value set to 15 (or greater)'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated volumetric CT series (PatientID: MPR001) consisting of 30 slices, generated by setup_task.sh because the default environment data lacks sufficient slices. Verification logic confirms the existence of the screenshot at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/mip_slab_view.png and text settings at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/mpr_settings.txt. The VLM verifier prompt confirms that the minimum expected MIP slab thickness is 15.
